creator: billf@jade.chc-chimes.com
text:
On Wed, 14 Apr 1999, Brett Taylor wrote:

> This is not a gtk problem, but a ports problem and has come up a number of
> times in -questions and/or -ports (for instance I just answered this
> yesterday for someone on -questions).  Patches patch-ad and patch-ae in
> the glib port put in the -Wl,E argument, but these arguments only work on
> an ELF system while you're running 2.2.8.  If you edit the above patches
> and remove the -Wl,E option, pkg_delete glib12, and then rebuild glib12
> everything will work fine.  

Okay, I will look into selectivly making this work for 2.2.8, I know it's
a 'dead' branch, but damnit, a lot of people still use it.

> I was going to try to do something about this so it would work for 2.2.8
> machines wo/ having to futz around but I haven't done this yet.  Feel free
> to attack this if you like.   :-)

Trust me, I will.
